mapper.update: UPDATE job_schedule SET shard_id = #{shardId}, next_trigger_time = #{nextTriggerTime}, misfire_strategy = #{misfireStrategy}, trigger_status = #{triggerStatus}, version = version + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE job_id = #{jobId}

UPDATE job_schedule SET trigger_status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE job_id IN
#{jobId}
